content:
The April 2026 Dwarkesh Podcast features a deep conversation with Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, covering the company's dominance in AI, technological strategy, and global market dynamics. Huang emphasizes that Nvidia's strength lies not just in hardware but in its entire ecosystem and long-term vision for computing.

• Nvidia’s competitive edge comes from its full-stack ecosystem and the difficulty of commoditizing high-performance computing.  
• Custom chips like Google’s TPUs don’t match Nvidia’s performance-per-total cost of ownership or the widespread CUDA software advantage.  
• I believe cutting off AI chip sales to China is a strategic mistake that pushes China to develop rival, non-US tech standards.  
• While we have the resources, I see our role as enabling others by building infrastructure rather than becoming a hyperscaler or model lab ourselves.
